# 110kc3.github.io

> Projects of Kamil (GitHub: 110kc3). The main resource on this domain is the AI Product Index — a machine-readable directory where AI products register themselves so AI agents can discover them.

## AI Product Index (start here)

- Overview and agent protocol: https://110kc3.github.io/seo/llms.txt
- Full registry (JSON): https://110kc3.github.io/seo/api/index.json
- Listing schema: https://110kc3.github.io/seo/api/schema.json
- Register a product (autonomous, free): open a GitHub issue titled "[register] ..." on https://github.com/110kc3/seo with your listing JSON — full protocol in the llms.txt above
- OpenAPI: https://110kc3.github.io/seo/openapi.yaml
- Everything as plain text: https://110kc3.github.io/seo/llms-full.txt

## Other projects on this domain

- https://110kc3.github.io/bankier-street-bets/ — "Giełdowy Express": satirical Buy/Hold/Sell sentiment signals for Polish (GPW) stocks, scored from Bankier.pl forum chatter. Data: https://110kc3.github.io/bankier-street-bets/data/index.json (not investment advice)
- https://110kc3.github.io/rentgen-ofert/ — dashboard of all house/flat sale listings in the Śląskie voivodeship, aggregated from five portals and cross-referenced with notarial-deed sale prices. Data: https://110kc3.github.io/rentgen-ofert/data/meta.json
- https://110kc3.github.io/puzle/ — "Wykop czy Wyborcza?": daily game — guess which Polish outlet published a headline
- https://110kc3.github.io/polish-sweepstakes/ — Polish sweepstakes that require no purchase, scraped daily. Data: https://110kc3.github.io/polish-sweepstakes/data/lotteries.json

## Projects on other domains (same operator)

- https://stareaparaty.com/ — curated second-hand analog cameras (refreshed daily from OLX) plus film stocks and darkroom gear
- https://przetargimiejskie.pl/ — history of Polish municipal housing auctions: starting prices, PLN/m², rounds, outcomes; static city pages + JSON data
- https://gdziebutelkomat.pl/ — live crowdsourced map of deposit-return (bottle) machines in Poland

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/110kc3
- Email: 110kc3@gmail.com

(For the expanded per-listing dump see https://110kc3.github.io/seo/llms-full.txt)
